journey.name: Long-press Hide
journey.description: Long-pressing a home tile shows the Hide/Uninstall/Cancel action row anchored to the tile; Hide removes the tile with a grid reflow and the hide persists across an app relaunch.

actions.action: Launch the Nocturne launcher (com.pavlovsfrog.minimaltvlauncher) and verify the app grid is shown with at least two app tiles.
Note the name of the first (focused) app tile, then long-press OK (KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER held for about a second) on it.
Verify a dimming scrim covers the screen and a three-item action row (Hide, Uninstall, Cancel) appears near the pressed tile, with focus on Hide.
Verify the menu closes and the noted app tile is no longer present on the home grid, with the remaining tiles reflowed to fill its place.
Force-stop and relaunch the launcher app.
Verify the hidden app is still absent from the home grid after the relaunch.
